title: Create: Prismatic Shine
description: A remake version of Create: Crystal Clear, adds glass casings and illumination casings to create
body:
![coverpage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9de560fbef448efb10716718469f4264120df430.png)
Create: Prismatic Shine

ABOUT

Create: Prismatic Shine is a remake mod for Create: Crystal Clear. It adds glass casings, glass scaffold and illumination casings to create. 

This mod was created because Create: Crystal Clear has not been updated for a long time, preventing players from enjoying glass casings in NeoForge 1.21.1 and Create 6.0. Additionally, this mod builds upon Create: Crystal Clear by adding illumination casings - a type of glass casing that emits light. 

Furthermore, we have modified some recipes to make this mod more aligned with vanilla Create. For example, you can now right-click on glass with Andesite Alloy to craft Andesite Glass Casing, which can then be processed into Andesite Clear Glass Casing using a Stonecutter or Mechanical Saw. If you right-click on Andesite Clear Glass Casing with Prismarine Crystals, you'll obtain Andesite Illumination Casing.
![prsim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec21785514d836b55a3c1ccdc94b278a73bb0a59_0.webp)
